title: Delicate Chicken Kebabs
description: A flavorful and tender chicken kebab dish, perfect for a quick and easy dinner. Marinated in a mixture of Egyptian spices and yogurt, these kebabs are sure to become a favorite.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, parsley, oregano, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and mix until coated with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as rice, salad, or pita bread.
